summary: Final verification of CelebrateCategoryStrip and CelebrateContentModal fixes. All 11 categories present, all modals open correctly. Desktop modal centering confirmed working. Birthday Cakes shows celebration category products (60 items). One issue: ProductCard.jsx still uses object-cover (not object-contain). Admin: 308 products load, but category dropdown uses legacy names ('cakes'/'frozen') instead of 'celebration'/'frozen-treats'.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 438 uses 'object-cover' not 'object-contain'. Review request specifies line 438 should be object-contain. Images will be cropped in product cards instead of showing full product.
ui_bugs.fix: Change line 438 from 'object-cover' to 'object-contain' in ProductCard.jsx

ui_bugs.issue: Category filter dropdown has 'cakes' and 'frozen' options instead of 'celebration' and 'frozen-treats'. Does not match backend category names used in CATEGORY_API.

test_results.11_categories_in_strip: ✅ ALL 11 CONFIRMED: birthday-cakes, breed-cakes, pupcakes, desi-treats, frozen-treats, hampers, bundles, party, nut-butters, soul-picks, miras-picks
test_results.birthday_cakes_modal: ✅ Opens, 63 product cards, modal says 'ALL BIRTHDAY CAKES — 60 ITEMS' (from celebration category)
test_results.desktop_modal_centering: ✅ CONFIRMED center_x=640.0 on 1280px viewport (diff=0px from expected 640)

action_items: FIX (LOW): ProductCard.jsx line 438 - change 'object-cover' to 'object-contain' as specified in files_of_reference
FIX (LOW): Admin CelebrateManager category dropdown - add 'celebration' and 'frozen-treats' to filter options (currently has legacy names 'cakes'/'frozen')
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx:438 - object-cover was NOT changed to object-contain despite being in files_of_reference. The main agent likely intended this fix but didn't apply it.
CelebrateManager admin category dropdown needs 'celebration' and 'frozen-treats' added as filter options to match backend category names.

success_rate.frontend: 90% - 9/10 requirements passed (object-contain fix missing, admin dropdown minor)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CelebrateCategoryStrip has 11 categories. CelebrateContentModal: birthday-cakes→celebration(60 items), frozen-treats(24), party(18), nut-butters(6), all modals open and centered. Desktop centering works (center_x=640 on 1280px). Close button found. Two minor issues: 1) ProductCard.jsx line 438 is still object-cover not object-contain; 2) Admin category dropdown uses legacy 'cakes'/'frozen' names. All major functionality is working.

rca_of_issue.object_contain_miss: ProductCard.jsx line 438 className='w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500'. The main agent noted this should be object-contain in files_of_reference but didn't change the code. Fix: replace 'object-cover' with 'object-contain' on line 438.
rca_of_issue.admin_dropdown_categories: CelebrateManager admin uses a select element with legacy category values. Backend now uses 'celebration' and 'frozen-treats' as category names but the admin dropdown still has old values 'cakes' and 'frozen'. Low impact - admin still loads 308 products and can filter by most categories.
